name: resources
description: Resource board (R8) + suggestion box (R9): member submit → instructor curate/triage. Pending visibility enforced in-query (P0); light per-tenant anti-spam via by_tenant_status (DATA-MODEL guard, not the rr rate-limit dep). Two mounted views: ResourceBoardView, SuggestionBoxView.
notes: 0.1.0 (2026-07-06, agent epsilon): STATUS row #7 (v1.1). Owns resources + suggestions tables. submit=member, curate/triage=instructor+, pending items visible only to instructor+ and the submitter (enforced in-query). Anti-spam = DATA-MODEL pending-count guard, NO rr rate-limit dependency. Copy-first: board/card shapes adapted from rr `library` (index/card + props-driven copy override), not imported. Optional resources.courseId supported by the mutation but omitted from the v1 submit form UI; instructor triage covers open→planned/done/rejected.
